wiki.summary: "MEXE" is a collaboration between the Brazilian drag queen Pabllo Vittar and the South Korean group NMIXX, released on August 21, 2025. The song mixes elements of Brazilian funk and K-POP, was made official as the second single from Vittar's new international album, scheduled for 2025. Read more on Last.fm.
